channel.title: Proxmoxve on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Proxmoxve on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog

item.title: How to nstall ProxmoxVE 5.x on Debian 9
item.description: Install Proxmox VE 5.x on Debian 9 Chang IP ADDRESS vi /etc/network/interfaces # This file describes the network interfaces available on your system # and how to activate them. For more information, see interfaces(5). source /etc/network/interfaces.d/* # The loopback network interface auto lo iface lo inet loopback # The primary network interface #allow-hotplug eno1 auto eno1 #iface eno1 inet dhcp iface eno1 inet static address *.*.*.* netmask *.*.*.* gateway *.
